module-5-gradebook-project.label: Module Project: Build a Gradebook
module-5-gradebook-project.summary: Use lists and dictionaries together to build a small gradebook program.

sketch0.title: Build a gradebook step by step

mp-1-create-student-list.title: Create a student list
mp-1-create-student-list.prompt: Module project step: Create a student list.
mp-1-create-student-list.hint: Build on the starter code from the previous step.

help.concept: This project grows one clean program step by step.
help.hint_2: The starter code is the canonical solution from the previous step plus the next task.

mp-1-create-student-list.starterCode:
students = []

# Add Ava, Mia, and Zoe to the list in that order.
# Then print the list.

mp-2-store-scores.title: Store scores in a dictionary
mp-2-store-scores.prompt: Module project step: Store scores in a dictionary.
mp-2-store-scores.hint: Build on the starter code from the previous step.

help.concept: This project grows one clean program step by step.
help.hint_2: The starter code is the canonical solution from the previous step plus the next task.

mp-2-store-scores.starterCode:
students = []
students.append('Ava')
students.append('Mia')
students.append('Zoe')
print(students)

# Now create a dictionary named scores for the same students.
# Ava has 92, Mia has 85, and Zoe has 97.
# Print the dictionary.

mp-3-print-passing-students.title: Print high-scoring students
mp-3-print-passing-students.prompt: Module project step: Print high-scoring students.
mp-3-print-passing-students.hint: Build on the starter code from the previous step.

help.concept: This project grows one clean program step by step.
help.hint_2: The starter code is the canonical solution from the previous step plus the next task.

mp-3-print-passing-students.starterCode:
students = ['Ava', 'Mia', 'Zoe']
scores = {'Ava': 92, 'Mia': 85, 'Zoe': 97}
print(students)
print(scores)

# Print only students with scores of 90 or higher, one per line.

mp-4-sort-grade-summary.title: Sort the grade summary
mp-4-sort-grade-summary.prompt: Module project step: Sort the grade summary.
mp-4-sort-grade-summary.hint: Build on the starter code from the previous step.

help.concept: This project grows one clean program step by step.
help.hint_2: The starter code is the canonical solution from the previous step plus the next task.

sketch-1.title: Build a gradebook step by step
sketch-1.bodyMarkdown: In this module project, you will combine the collection skills from this module. Each step starts from the previous canonical solution, then adds one new feature.
